problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: The key to What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? is Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region — specifically Glial cell activation/suppression — which would help 75,000,000 people affected.
